features: BUBBLE BATH: Enter a blissful world with our relaxing Lavender and Wild Iris bath soak - wash your troubles away
RELAXING FRAGRANCE: Pamper yourself with this calming bath soak bursting with Lavender and Wild Iris Fragrance - loosen up your body and wind down your mind
FORMULATION: Bursting with luxurious bubbles, this indulgent bath soak is designed to leave your skin beautifully soft - the perfect addition to any bathtub
SKIN CARE: Imperial Leather bath soak is dermatologically tested and suitable for all skin types - gentle body wash made for self care
BULK BUY: These 4 x bottles of bath soak is a great bulk buy for the whole family - beauty products you can trust
description: Product Description IMPERIAL LEATHER BATH 500ml - RELAXING (PACK OF 4) With over 100 years of expertise in hand crafting luxury fragrances, choose Imperial Leather for best in class fragrance bloom and sumptuous lather. Loosen up your body and pamper yourself in our richest, creamiest lather ever with our Relaxing Lavender and Wild Iri Bath Soak. Enter a blissful world and wrap yourself in endless clouds of lather enriched with our signature oil blend for a touch of extravagance and timeless quality. Bursting with luxurious bubbles, this indulgent bath soak is designed to leave your skin beautifully soft, relax up your body and wind down your mind . The perfect addition to any bathtub, this Relaxing Lavender and Wild Iri Bath Soak. makes the perfect gift for someone special. These 4 x bottles of bath soak is a great bulk buy for the whole family and the perfect addition to your self care routine. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, PEG-200 Hydrogenated Glyceryl Palmate, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Polyquaternium-7, PEG-6 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Sodium Chloride, Coumarin, Limonene, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, CI 42090, CI 17200. Directions Add the desired amount of Imperial Leather Relaxing Bath Soak to running bathwater. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes. See more
